title: 一年一度既全球百大靚女又就快要公佈結果了(2017)

replies.msg:

作為巴打
梗係關心美女喇

應該聽朝有結果

男唔理喇


TC Candler presents The Annual Independent Critics List of the 100 Most Beautiful Faces, which has been published, in various formats, every year since 1990... and in recent years has been seen by well over 100 million people from around the world.

歷年冠軍





Result:7pm USA Eastern Time)(11pm UK Time)(8am on 28th Tokyo / Seoul Time)(4am on 28th India Time) - The 100 Most Beautiful Faces of 2017 and The 100 Most Handsome Faces of 2017! 💯🏆😍📸Coming December 27th, 2017!

replies.msg:
麗莎索貝諾（liza soberano）是一名菲律賓當地的演員。她是菲律賓裔美國混血女星，同Enrique Gil的LizQuen亦是有名的螢幕情侶組合。

麗莎索貝諾（liza soberano）以其混血迷人的樣子有名，很多支持者亦因為如此而拜倒在其裙下。

她現在和其拍搭Enrique Gil出演菲律賓電視台的電視節目Dolce Amore。
